wins_analysis: No wins today — no targets were hit. The two open BUY positions (ICICIBANK, KOTAKBANK) are aligned with the trending_up regime and may still reach target tomorrow if the uptrend continues.
losses_analysis: No losses today either. However, the system placed a SELL order on TATASTEEL (38% AI probability) against a strong trending_up regime, which is a process error even though it hasn't triggered yet. The pre-trade filter logic correctly identified this contradiction but still placed the order.
regime_impact: The trending_up regime (+1.1%, ADX 25) strongly favored BUY setups. The two open BUY positions (ICICIBANK, KOTAKBANK) are correctly aligned. The only new recommendation was a counter-trend SELL which the system should have hard-blocked. Strategy type that fits best: demand zone BUY setups with trend confirmation.

improvements.action: Hard-block all SELL orders when market regime is trending_up AND AI probability is below 65%. Do not place them as pending — reject at order generation stage.
improvements.reason: TATASTEEL SELL (38% prob) was placed despite the report narrative explicitly noting it contradicts the regime. The filter logic identified the issue but did not prevent order placement.

improvements.action: When only 1 setup is found and it contradicts the regime, place ZERO new orders. Accept a no-trade day rather than forcing a low-probability counter-trend trade.
improvements.reason: Today had only 1 setup available (TATASTEEL SELL) which went against the dominant uptrend. Forcing this trade adds risk with no statistical edge.

improvements.action: For open positions ICICIBANK and KOTAKBANK, trail stops to breakeven if they gain +0.5% from entry tomorrow morning. Lock in the regime-aligned trades.
improvements.reason: Both are BUY positions in a trending_up regime. Protecting capital while letting winners run is critical since we had no closed P&L today.

improvements.action: Expand scan to include Nifty Next 50 stocks when Nifty 50 yields fewer than 3 regime-aligned setups, to avoid forcing counter-trend trades.
improvements.reason: Only 1 Nifty 50 setup was found today and it was counter-trend. Broader scan universe would provide more aligned opportunities on strong trend days.

improvements.action: Set minimum AI probability threshold to 55% for any order placement regardless of zone score. A 38% probability should never result in an order.
improvements.reason: TATASTEEL had 38% AI probability — well below coinflip odds. Even a high zone score (48/60) cannot compensate for such low directional confidence.

tomorrow_focus: Monitor ICICIBANK and KOTAKBANK open BUY positions for target hits; only take new BUY setups with AI prob >55% aligned with the uptrend; cancel the pending TATASTEEL SELL if still active.

symbol_notes.ICICIBANK: BUY position aligned with regime — trail stop to breakeven if it opens above ₹1,244. High priority to manage for profit.
symbol_notes.KOTAKBANK: BUY position aligned with regime — trail stop to breakeven if it opens above ₹387. Watch for banking sector momentum continuation.
symbol_notes.TATASTEEL: Counter-trend SELL at 38% probability — cancel this pending order immediately at market open. Do not re-enter SELL unless regime flips.
